messages: Select a ref to see it's history
Select a ref to see it's history of {0}
Select a author to see his/her commits
Input a ref(sha1) to see it's committed files
Select a ref to see the diff with local copy of {0}
Select a ref to see it's diff with {0} or select two refs to see their diffs
Input a ref(sha1) to compare with {0} or 'ref(sha1) .. ref(sha2)' to compare with two commits
Select a branch to see its history
Select an author to see the commits
Turn on or off of the history view Express mode
